ddls:
CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the activity belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the activity */,
  "activity_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the activity in hours or days */,
  "activity_cost" TEXT /* Estimated cost of the activity */,
  "activity_rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the activity based on user feedback */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the activity is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewpoints" (
  "viewpoint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewpoint */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity the viewpoint belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the viewpoint */,
  "viewpoint_text" TEXT /* Text of the viewpoint */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the viewpoint was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the viewpoint was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viewpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewpoints_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewpoints_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "viewpoint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the viewpoint the response belongs to */,
  "response_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response type */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of users with this response type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the response was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the response was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_viewpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("viewpoint_id") REFERENCES viewpoints ("viewpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_response_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_type_id") REFERENCES response_types ("response_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "interests" TEXT /* Interests of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_responses" (
  "user_response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user response */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the response */,
  "viewpoint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the viewpoint the response belongs to */,
  "response_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user response was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user response was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_responses_viewpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("viewpoint_id") REFERENCES viewpoints ("viewpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_responses_response_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_type_id") REFERENCES response_types ("response_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_responses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the category is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_types" (
  "response_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response type */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Name of the response type (e.g., Agree_Strongly, Agree, Not_Sure, Disagree, Disagree_Strongly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the response type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the response type is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_type_id")
)
